title: Heap Construction and Heapsort Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of building a max heap from an array and then using it to perform the heapsort algorithm, showing key operations like heapify and element extraction.
relationships: Array elements are reorganized into a max heap through heapify operations
The root element (largest) is repeatedly extracted and placed at the end of the array
After each extraction, heap property is restored until the array is fully sorted
